title: Meridian Emerging Markets Equity Fund
content:
MERIDIAN EMERGING MARKETS EQUITY FUND - PRODUCT FACTSHEET

Fund Overview
The Meridian Emerging Markets Equity Fund (ISIN: LU2847592841) is a UCITS-compliant equity fund domiciled in Luxembourg, targeting long-term capital appreciation through exposure to emerging market equities. The fund maintains an aggressive risk profile with a target volatility range of 18-25% annually, reflecting the inherent volatility of emerging market securities.

Investment Strategy
The fund employs an active bottom-up stock selection approach across emerging markets, with geographic allocation flexibility spanning Asia-Pacific (45-65%), Latin America (15-25%), EMEA (10-20%), and frontier markets (0-15%). Our investment committee maintains sector allocation limits of maximum 25% in any single sector, with current overweight positions in technology (23.4%), financials (19.7%), and consumer discretionary (16.8%).

Risk Considerations
This product carries significant risks consistent with its aggressive classification under MiFID II Article 25 suitability requirements. Key risk factors include currency volatility (average 8-12% annual impact), political instability, liquidity constraints during market stress, and regulatory changes in target markets. The fund's Value-at-Risk (VaR) model indicates potential monthly losses of up to 15.7% at the 99% confidence level.

Performance Metrics
Since inception (March 2019), the fund has delivered annualized returns of 8.34% (EUR hedged share class) versus the MSCI Emerging Markets Index benchmark return of 6.78%. However, this outperformance came with elevated volatility of 22.3% versus benchmark volatility of 19.8%. The Sharpe ratio of 0.37 reflects the risk-adjusted return profile typical of emerging market strategies.

Fee Structure and Share Classes
The fund offers three share classes: Class A (retail) with 1.85% annual management fee plus 0.23% ongoing charges, Class I (institutional) at 0.95% management fee plus 0.18% ongoing charges, and Class P (private wealth) at 0.65% management fee for minimum investments of EUR 1 million. Performance fees of 20% above benchmark apply to all classes with high-water mark provisions.

Regulatory Compliance
As a UCITS Directive-compliant fund, the product maintains diversification limits of maximum 10% in any single issuer and 40% aggregate exposure to any single emerging market country. The fund undergoes quarterly liquidity stress testing and maintains minimum 5% cash reserves. Under MiFID II Article 25 requirements, this product is suitable only for clients with aggressive risk tolerance, relevant investment experience, and investment horizons exceeding five years.

Target Client Profile
Recommended for advisor-level clients (Tier 2+) seeking emerging market exposure as part of a diversified portfolio allocation. Typical allocation recommendations range from 5-15% of total equity exposure, depending on client risk capacity and investment objectives. The fund complements developed market holdings and provides inflation hedging characteristics through exposure to commodity-linked economies.

Liquidity and Settlement
Daily dealing with T+3 settlement for subscriptions and redemptions. Redemption gates of maximum 10% of fund NAV per dealing day may apply during stressed market conditions, consistent with UCITS regulatory framework and investor protection measures.
